## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`back/tests/**` and/or frontend smoke).
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck && pnpm build` passes locally.
- [ ] I have NOT committed any secrets, datasets, or MLflow artifacts.
- [ ] I have updated the relevant `README.md` / docstring.
